app.title: Learning Path Navigator
app.subtitle: Gatame Kosen Online — Personalized learning system

retakeAssessment.title: Retake the assessment?
retakeAssessment.description: Your current learning path will be cleared. Your module progress (completed steps and notes) will stay saved.

bbsMastered.title: Mark this rank as mastered?
bbsMastered.description: Your declaration is recorded permanently for this assessment and cannot be undone from the app.

annualMembership.title: Confirm your Annual Membership
annualMembership.description: We will stop showing the upgrade prompt going forward. You can re-trigger it later via Profile if needed.

bbsReminderText: No additional one-time purchase is needed. You already have access to this curriculum!

errors.learningPathFailed: Could not load your learning path.
errors.imageExportFailed: Could not export the image. Try taking a screenshot instead.
errors.pathGenerationCanceled: Path generation canceled. You can try again anytime.

toast.feedbackSaveFailed: Could not save your feedback. Completion is recorded locally.
toast.todoSaveFailed: Could not save the checklist update. Check your connection.
toast.memoSaveFailed: Could not save your notes. Check your connection.

signUpEmailSent.title: Confirmation email sent
signUpEmailSent.instruction: Open that email, tap Confirm, then sign in here.
signUpEmailSent.spamHint: Not in inbox? Check spam — sender is Supabase Auth.

banner.syncing: Saving your progress to the cloud…
banner.pending: Some changes are not saved to the cloud yet
banner.error: Could not save progress to the cloud
banner.offline: You are offline — progress will sync when you are back online

api.backendUnreachable: Could not reach the backend. Start Spring Boot in `backend` (default port 8080), keep the frontend on `npm run dev`, and try again.
api.proxyFailed: The request did not reach the backend via the proxy. Check that Spring Boot is listening on localhost:8080.
api.badRequest: The server could not accept the request (400).
api.requestRejected: The server rejected the request payload (400).
api.requestTimedOut: Generating your path is taking longer than expected. Please try again.

verticalPath.noPath: No shortest path can be displayed.

moduleHints.problemMatch: This module aligns strongly with the challenges you picked. Picture real match moments and drill with intent.
moduleHints.default: Watch the overview video, then build clean reps solo or in a small group.

pathDrawer.memoPlaceholder: Note down the points you noticed or tips from your sensei.
pathDrawer.prereqForComplete: Complete prerequisite modules to enable the completion button.
pathDrawer.lockedByAssessment: This step is locked based on your assessment results.
pathDrawer.allTodosForComplete: Check every item in the checklist to enable "Mark as Completed".

feedback.title: Step completion feedback
feedback.q3: Question 3 (Optional): Are there any specific techniques or videos you'd like to see added?
feedback.q3Placeholder: e.g., Variations for transitions into pinning...

assessment.q1Title: Q1. Which best describes you right now?
assessment.q2InterestTitle: Q2. Where do you want to put more emphasis in training?
assessment.q3PainsTitle: Which technical challenge would you like to solve?
assessment.q3PainsHint: Select your current struggles to customize your roadmap. You can pick multiple—or skip this step.
assessment.q2AltHint: There are no wrong answers—go with what resonates.
assessment.q5Title: Define your ultimate goal for this path.

interests.title: Tachi-waza to Osaekomi
interests.body: Focus on throwing techniques and securing the pin.

interests.title: Guard & Submission
interests.body: Focus on guard work, back takes, and finishing with joint locks or chokes.

interests.title: Full Transition
interests.body: Focus on the seamless flow from standing positions to ground fighting.

noviceVibes.label: 投げたい
noviceVibes.title: Dynamic Throws
noviceVibes.vibe: Master the iconic Judo throws to achieve a clean Ippon.

noviceVibes.label: 抑え込み（Judo）
noviceVibes.title: Ground Control
noviceVibes.vibe: Learn to hold down an opponent so they cannot escape or attack.

noviceVibes.label: 極めたい
noviceVibes.title: Submission Arts
noviceVibes.vibe: Learn to finish the fight using joint locks and chokes.

noviceVibes.label: 連動性（Mix）
noviceVibes.title: Standing to Ground
noviceVibes.vibe: Learn the flow of taking an opponent down and finishing immediately.

goals.title: Fix Your Weakness
goals.body: Solve specific technical bottlenecks in your daily training.

goals.title: Gatame Kosen Mastery
goals.body: Master the full technical curriculum and earn your Black Belt.

goals.title: Fill the Gaps
goals.body: Complete your skill tree by adding missing techniques to your game.

goals.title: Curriculum for Coaches
goals.body: Learn how to structure and explain techniques to your students.

standing-flow-to-submission.headline: Throw to Submission
standing-flow-to-submission.scenario: I can't finish the fight on the ground immediately after a throw.

pin-after-throw.headline: Pin Escapes
pin-after-throw.scenario: Opponents always escape before I can solidify the Osaekomi.

turtle-breakdown.headline: Flipping the Turtle
turtle-breakdown.scenario: I can't flip or breakdown a turtle opponent into a pin.

guard-pass-from-top.headline: Guard Pass Struggles
guard-pass-from-top.scenario: I can't pass their guard. I want to break their defense.

guard-bottom-sweep-submit.headline: Guard Defense & Sweeps
guard-bottom-sweep-submit.scenario: I don't want to be passed. I want to keep my guard and sweep them.

grip-fight.headline: Gripping Battles
grip-fight.scenario: I lose the gripping fight and can't start my own techniques.

escape-osaekomi.headline: Drained by Pins
escape-osaekomi.scenario: I waste all my energy trying to escape from the bottom.
